name: workflow_response_test
outcome_goal: End-to-end proof: workflow fires via MCP, claude-opus CLI binary executes real reasoning over mounted source, writes a real output file. Pass = run.status=succeeded AND artifacts/workflow_response_test/output.md exists with non-empty content.

jobs.label: summarize_praxis_design
jobs.prompt: Read the file /workspace/.claude/CLAUDE.md. Produce a 2-paragraph summary of the praxis architecture's most distinctive design choice based on what you actually read. Then write the summary to /workspace/artifacts/workflow_response_test/output.md (create the directory if it does not exist). The file must contain only the summary, no preamble or meta-commentary.
